moderators.language_notes: Language switcher shows Portuguese and English options

evidence.API_evidence: Portal describes 'Bradesco APIs to transform your business' with 'complete portfolio' of integrations. Multiple API categories shown: Ágora Investimentos APIs, Receivables APIs, Conciliation APIs. Registration required to 'access our full portfolio'.
evidence.SDK_evidence: No SDK downloads, client libraries, or code samples found in the scraped content.
evidence.AI_evidence: No AI models, agents, or AI-related tools mentioned in the content.
evidence.language_evidence: Language switcher shows 'English/EN' and 'Português' options. Footer contains Portuguese legal text and LGPD reference.

coding_notes: API=1 based on multiple API categories described and developer registration portal. ROLE=1 because registration/login required to access APIs implies scoped access. DATA=1 due to LGPD (General Data Protection Law) reference in footer. OPEN=0 because 'Log in to access our full portfolio' indicates registration required for API access. METH=0 because no specific HTTP methods documented in available content.
